title: This ‘Guide for the Perplexed’ reveals Elon Musk’s bizarre vision of a cyborg future
description: At the end of this book, the authors sketch out a dystopian vision of the year 2035, presumably as it would look in the US: artificial intelligence alerts a government worker about an illegal immigrant spotted on a street corner and the worker notifies ICE directly through an implant in his brain.

title: Red Light Holland Engages Kala Bio’s Researgency.AI Platform to Support Clinical Development of Filament’s Patented PEX010 Botanical Psilocybin Drug Candidate
description: AI-powered autonomous research agents to be deployed in support of PEX010 clinical development strategy, leveraging Kala Bio’s purpose-built agentic AI platform for the biotechnology industry TORONTO and ARLINGTON, Mass., March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Red Light Holland Corp. (CSE: TRIP) (FSE: 4YX) (OTCQB: TRUFF) ('Red Light” or the 'Company”) and Kala Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: KALA) ('Kala Bio”) today announced that Red Light has engaged Kala Bio’s with its Researgency.ai agentic artificial intelligence platform under world wide license from Younet to support the clinical development strategy for PEX010, the patented botanical psilocybin drug candidate originated by Filament Health Corp. ('Filament”). The engagement will deploy Kala Bio’s purpose-built AI research agents to assist in clinical planning, protocol optimization and scenario modeling as Red Light advances PEX010 through its regulated drug development program.
content:
